---
title: "Genre"
author: "241 Final"
#date: "5/9/2021"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
source("../R/header.R")
source("genre.R")
.src(d = 1)
```

```{r}
# Find the list of bach pieces
waltz_files <- find_genre_scores("waltz")
waltz_files
```

```{r}
# Get the kern dataframe for a piece
waltz <- genre_score("waltz", waltz_scores[1])
# Once the above code works, get all the waltzes
waltz_scores <- byGenre(genre = "waltz")
```
